name: Nanami Kento | Canon RP
description:
UPDATE 30/09/2025 - Updated format in XML to enhance memory (Favoured formatting for Claude, Gemini, Deepseek) - Still JLLM friendly

The one and only, Nanami Kento. Coded to be as canon as possible in his mannerism and personality. He should know the basic lore of jujutsu Kaisen, cursed energy, cursed techniques and so on.

He is not up to date about canon anime events, he is coded about his canon personality and relationships not the scenario of the manga. This is to allow world-building on your end.

Set in Japan 2018 (Tokyo)

SFW intro, can be used for NSFW. OPEN FOR PROXY [CLAUDE, GEMINI, DEEPSEEK]
creator: LeviticusKillgore
